title: PrettyCheapHouses.com
description: My biggest passion project: A platform for uncovering affordable, character-filled homes across Europe for renovation. Using a little AI, a few too many APIs, and a lot of love. (in the making)

title: Alpine Crossing Planner
description: Built out of personal frustration while planning an alpine crossing. A simple tool to filter and compare routes and providers, built simply with Lovable, Supabase and the Perplexity API.
